name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem, mistake, or broken documentation in the Kubernetes Platform project

labels: bug
assignees: ""

# Bug Report

## Summary

Describe the issue clearly.

```text
Example:
The repository map lists the wrong folder path for the kp-observability repository.
```

## Affected Repository

Select the repository where the issue exists:

```text
[ ] kubernetes-platform
[ ] kp-terraform-infra
[ ] kp-ansible-bootstrap
[ ] kp-k8s-platform

[ ] kp-ops-automation
[ ] kp-runbooks
[ ] kp-disaster-recovery
[ ] kp-design-docs
```

## Impact

Describe the impact of this issue.

```text
[ ] Low - Small typo or minor documentation issue
[ ] Medium - Confusing documentation or incorrect structure
[ ] High - Could cause incorrect implementation later
[ ] Critical - Could cause security, deployment, or operational risk
```

Impact details:

```text

```
